ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the NHS Trust or region */,
  "scn" TEXT /* Strategic Clinical Network related to the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "number_of_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidences" (
  "incidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incidence record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the incidence is reported */,
  "pancreatic_incidence" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer incidences */,
  "all_incidence" INTEGER /* Total cancer incidences reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the incidence data was recorded */,
  "pancreatic_incidence_stage1" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer incidences at stage 1 */,
  "pancreatic_incidence_stage2" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer incidences at stage 2 */,
  "pancreatic_incidence_stage3" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer incidences at stage 3 */,
  "pancreatic_incidence_stage4" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer incidences at stage 4 */,
  "pancreatic_incidence_nostage" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer incidences with no stage information */,
  "all_incidence_stage1" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer incidences at stage 1 */,
  "all_incidence_stage2" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer incidences at stage 2 */,
  "all_incidence_stage3" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer incidences at stage 3 */,
  "all_incidence_stage4" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer incidences at stage 4 */,
  "all_incidence_nostage" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer incidences with no stage information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidences_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortalities" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the mortality is reported */,
  "pancreatic_mortality" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer mortalities */,
  "all_mortality" INTEGER /* Total cancer mortalities reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the mortality data was recorded */,
  "pancreatic_mortality_stage1" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer mortalities at stage 1 */,
  "pancreatic_mortality_stage2" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer mortalities at stage 2 */,
  "pancreatic_mortality_stage3" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer mortalities at stage 3 */,
  "pancreatic_mortality_stage4" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer mortalities at stage 4 */,
  "pancreatic_mortality_nostage" INTEGER /* Number of pancreatic cancer mortalities with no stage information */,
  "all_mortality_stage1" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer mortalities at stage 1 */,
  "all_mortality_stage2" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer mortalities at stage 2 */,
  "all_mortality_stage3" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer mortalities at stage 3 */,
  "all_mortality_stage4" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer mortalities at stage 4 */,
  "all_mortality_nostage" INTEGER /* Number of all cancer mortalities with no stage information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortalities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the cancer cases */,
  "stage1" INTEGER /* Number of stage 1 pancreatic cancer cases */,
  "stage2" INTEGER /* Number of stage 2 pancreatic cancer cases */,
  "stage3" INTEGER /* Number of stage 3 pancreatic cancer cases */,
  "stage4" INTEGER /* Number of stage 4 pancreatic cancer cases */,
  "nostage" INTEGER /* Number of cases with no staging information */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the stage data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare provider, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Summary of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report (e.g., analysis results) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., incidence, mortality, stage) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report content */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NHS Trust) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., hospital, research institute) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "last_data_submission" TEXT /* Date of the last data submission from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the data (scale of 1-10) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the quality review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
